subtitle: Doors opening — build the pipeline

planetInfluences.summary: Opens doors and widens the pipeline

tropicalReading.body: Today is Expansion — leverage opens through preparation, not display. Use it to move one practical item: a document, contact, budget, or decision tied to the move. Capricorn Rising discipline and the 12th-House annual profection keep this a foundation year, not a victory lap. Uranus sextile Jupiter supports openings; Moon sextile Pluto sharpens consequence. Work the 2nd-House North Node self-valuation arc, protect structural leverage, and ignore noise around speed or certainty.

traditionalReading.body:
Today is expansion through clean judgment — choose the useful opening and turn it into a working draft. Use the day to ask, write, pitch, study, and refine the move before binding it. The monthly profection is the 9th whole-sign house in Virgo, with Mercury as lord of the month; Mercury is well-placed in domicile and exaltation and supported by Mercury sextile Mercury. Mercury is the clean blade: cut the draft, not the relationship. Jupiter sextile Mars supports action, but Mars is out of sect; push, then stop before force becomes waste.

Moon today — Moon in Virgo, your 9th whole-sign house. Treat opinions as material for revision: verify claims, tighten the plan, and ignore abstract debate that does not change the next move.

vedicReading.body:
Today is Expansion — opportunity through disciplined outreach, document cleanup, and move logistics. Open doors, compare terms, and keep signatures for the stronger External Manifestation Windows, especially Aug 12 – Sep 5 2026. For Sagittarius Lagna, the Moon–Venus–Jupiter Vimshottari chain supports relationship and value-positive conversations, while Sade Sati keeps the home base heavy. Mercury sextile Mercury favors clean messages; Venus conjunction Ketu says prune weak attachments. Saturn is the quiet edit, not the loud cut.

Moon today — Moon in Leo, your 9th house, nakshatra Purva Phalguni pada 3. Use the day for travel planning, legal/admin review, mentor conversations, and decisions that widen options without locking the move too early.

baziReading.body: Today is Yi-Chou — Yin Wood Resource feeding your Ding Fire through a quiet Ox base. Build leverage: document the move, strengthen one relationship, and turn Resource into Output. Mang Zhong’s Jia-Wu month and the 2026 Horse Ben Ming field favor visible preparation, while Wu-Zi Da Yun keeps pressure on execution. For the Rabbit core, this is a controlled burn, not a wildfire. Move visibly; do not turn competition into compulsion or scatter into too many parallel fires.

tarotCard.name: Four of Swords
tarotCard.body: Four of Swords — stability in clarity; consolidate and hold what you've built. Today is Expansion: build leverage and document the move, but keep formal commitments for later. Jupiter carries the field, and Saturn is the constraint to respect. Moon sextile Pluto is the sharpest aspect today — let it set the operating language. The Jupiter Return sits 22 days out, so treat today as part of that setup.

tropicalMonthly.body: The dominant month is preparation, not payoff: June 21 shifts the Sun into Cancer, moving attention from workflow cleanup into agreements, counterparties, and contract positioning. For Capricorn Rising in a 12th-House profection year, this is quiet leverage: build the pipeline, clarify terms, and let formal weight land after late August. The 2nd-House North Node self-valuation arc keeps the real question on pricing, ownership, and contribution; this is a valuation cycle you work, not a predetermined one. Jupiter supports openings, but Saturn/Pluto keep pressure on consequences, shared resources, and structural leverage. July 12 resets partnership expansion; July 16 makes competence and old sensitivity visible in career terms. Mars-Venus is friction looking for a build, not a fight: ignore noise, refine offers, document value, and avoid reopening stale fairness disputes.

traditionalMonthly.body: This month is led by Mercury, lord of the 9th whole-sign house in Virgo, and Mercury is exceptionally strong natally: in domicile and exaltation, so prioritize planning, publishing, study, legal/admin clarity, and sharper decision rules. As lord of the year, Jupiter keeps the larger 12th-house Sagittarius year in preparation mode; expansion works best behind the scenes, through systems you can formalize later. Mercury’s supportive sextile and Mars’ trine give useful movement, but Mars is out of sect in a day chart, so act decisively without turning pressure into conflict. Mercury is the clean instrument on the workbench: measure twice, document once, then move. Around June 30, the monthly profection hands to Libra and Venus, shifting attention toward the 10th whole-sign house: reputation, deliverables, and visible standards.

vedicMonthly.body: Dominant influence: Moon–Venus–Jupiter makes this a preparation month for value, allies, property, and work leverage, while Sade Sati / Small Panoti keeps pressure high through 2027-06-02. From Jun 20–30, the active External Manifestation Window favors decisions, career movement, and relationship clarification, but the correct move is pipeline-building, not final commitment. The transit Moon starts in Purva Phalguni and cycles the 27 nakshatras, so personal tone will move faster than the real structure. Saturn is the quiet edit, not the loud cut. What matters: documentation, cash-flow cleanup, repairable systems, and useful conversations. What does not: reacting to every mood spike. Build leverage now; ignore old disputes around fairness or value unless they affect a current agreement. Aug 12–Sep 5 is the stronger landing window.

baziMonthly.body: Structural priority is the 戊子 Wu-Zi Da Yun: Output over Power means build proof, systems, and leverage before asking for weight-bearing commitments after late August. Today, 2026-06-20, is 乙丑 Yi-Chou: Resource feeding Ding Fire into Output, favoring preparation, documentation, training, and practical cleanup. The 甲午 Jia-Wu month from Mang Zhong keeps Resource plus Horse Fire strong around your Rabbit core and 2026 Ben Ming peer-fire field: move visibly, but do not turn competition into compulsion or scatter into too many parallel fires. This month is a controlled burn: useful heat only if it is contained by one clear pipeline. On 2026-07-07, Xiao Shu shifts the month to 乙未 Yi-Wei, making Resource-to-Output more concrete; 2026-07-07 to 2026-09-07 becomes the visible-move stack, with 2026-07-12 as a key center-of-gravity marker.

tacticalSlots.note: Year branch repeats in 2026 — drive and visibility run hot
Natal month AND hour branch — structural pressure is real
Your true core branch — finesse, curation, clean expression over force
Mnemonic overlay only — not a natal pillar (literal hour branch is Monkey)

consensus.primaryAction: Move one important item forward and refine it before adding anything else.

todaysInsight: Build the pipeline and price your contribution clearly. Hold off on final commitments.

opportunity: Jupiter is lord of the year (benefic regime)
approaching benefic window: Jupiter return — chapter reset (22d)
pressure: Sade Sati (Small Panoti) — pressure on foundations
momentum: BaZi Da Yun shift within 87 days
